name: Sb Admin
title: Dashboard - SB Admin
description: Full-featured admin dashboard template with a dark top navbar containing brand, sidebar toggle button, search input, and user dropdown menu. Left sidebar (225px) with dark theme features collapsible accordion navigation organized into Core (Dashboard), Interface (Layouts, Pages with Authentication and Error sub-items), and Addons (Charts, Tables) sections. Sidebar footer shows logged-in user info. Main content area displays a Dashboard heading with breadcrumb, then a row of 4 colored status cards (Primary blue, Warning yellow, Success green, Danger red) each with View Details link. Below, two side-by-side chart cards (Area Chart and Bar Chart using Canvas). At the bottom, a full-width DataTable card with sortable columns (Name, Position, Office, Age, Start date, Salary). Dark footer with copyright.

typography.fontFamily: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
typography.style: Standard Bootstrap system font stack, clean and functional for data-heavy interfaces

layoutDetails: Fixed top navbar (56px height). Sidebar 225px width with flex layout, transforms off-screen on mobile. Main content uses container-fluid with px-4 padding. Status cards in col-xl-3 col-md-6 grid. Charts in col-xl-6 two-column layout. DataTable full-width below.
visualStyle: Clean, functional, corporate. Dark sidebar and topbar with light gray content area. Colored status cards for quick metrics. White card containers with subtle borders. Data-focused layout optimized for admin workflows.

name: Sb Admin 2
title: SB Admin 2 - Dashboard
description: Premium admin dashboard template (Bootstrap 4) with a gradient blue sidebar featuring brand logo with rotating icon, collapsible navigation organized into Interface (Components, Utilities), Addons (Pages, Charts, Tables) sections, sidebar toggle button, and a promotional card. White top navbar with search bar, notification bell with badge counter (3+), message envelope with badge (7), user profile dropdown with avatar. Main content shows Dashboard heading with Generate Report button, then 4 KPI metric cards with colored left borders (Primary: Monthly Earnings $40,000, Success: Annual Earnings $215,000, Info: Tasks 50% with progress bar, Warning: Pending Requests 18) each with a large gray icon. Below, two chart cards (Earnings Overview area chart, Revenue Sources donut chart). Bottom row has Projects card with progress bars. Scroll-to-top button and logout confirmation modal.

typography.style: Rounded, friendly Nunito font throughout. Small uppercase labels for metrics. Clean hierarchy with weight-based differentiation.

layoutDetails: Fixed sidebar (224px, collapsible to icon-only 104px). White topbar with shadow. Main content in container-fluid. KPI cards in col-xl-3 col-md-6 grid with colored left border (4px). Charts in col-xl-8 and col-xl-4 layout. Bootstrap 4 grid system with jQuery-based interactions.
visualStyle: Polished, professional, modern SaaS dashboard. Blue gradient sidebar with white topbar. Soft shadows on cards. Colored left-border accent on KPI cards. Clean data visualization with Chart.js. Friendly rounded typography.

name: Dashboard
title: Dashboard, Free HTML5 Admin Template
description: Admin dashboard template with sidebar navigation. Dark navbar with title. Left sidebar (235px) with search, vertical menu with icons and badges, nested submenu, sign-out modal. Main content on white with breadcrumbs, nav pills, 4 alert types, list groups, progress bars, Chart.js line chart, user table, 4-tab interface, and 3-panel accordion. Dark footer.

typography.style: Standard Bootstrap typography with Open Sans

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar 235px, float-based. Main content margin-left 235px. Sidebar collapses below 992px. Zero border-radius on all Bootstrap components.
visualStyle: Clean admin dashboard, flat design. Zero border-radius for sharp look. Light gray bg with white content. Green accent for active states.

name: Product Admin
title: Product Admin - Dashboard HTML Template
description: Admin dashboard template with a dark blue/navy color scheme. Top navigation bar with site title, dropdown menus for Reports and Settings, and links to Dashboard, Products, and Accounts pages. Welcome message greets the admin user. Dashboard displays four main content blocks in a 2x2 grid: a line chart for Latest Hits, a bar chart for Performance, a pie chart for Storage Information, and a scrollable Notification List with avatar images and timestamps. Below, an Order Status table with product thumbnails, names, payment info, and status badges. Expiry date notification bar at bottom. Multi-page with products management, accounts, and login pages. Uses Roboto font and Chart.js for data visualization.

typography.style: Clean system-like sans-serif for data-heavy dashboard interface

layoutDetails: Dashboard layout with top navigation bar and 2x2 content grid below. Chart blocks arranged in responsive grid. Data table with product rows. Multi-page admin structure with products CRUD, accounts management, and login page.
visualStyle: Dark navy admin dashboard with card-based chart panels. Chart.js visualizations (line, bar, pie). Notification list with avatars. Data table with status badges. Professional admin/backend aesthetic.

name: Visual Admin
title: Visual Admin Dashboard - Home
description: Admin dashboard template with a dark sidebar and light gray main content area. Sidebar contains a profile photo with overlay effect, search box, and icon-based navigation (Dashboard, Charts, Data Visualization, Maps, Manage Users, Preferences, Sign Out). Main area has a top secondary navigation bar and a content grid of colored widget cards (white, orange, pink, green, yellow backgrounds) with close buttons and decorative square accents. Widgets display text content, progress bars, and data summaries. Multi-page with Charts, Maps, Manage Users, Preferences, and Login pages. Dark (#1f2124) sidebar with teal (#39ADB4) accent color.

typography.style: Light weight body text with clean sans-serif, dashboard-optimized readability

layoutDetails: Fixed dark sidebar with scrollable light gray main content. Flexbox row layout. Top secondary nav in main area. Widget cards in responsive grid. Multi-page admin structure.
visualStyle: Modern admin dashboard with dark sidebar contrast. Colorful widget cards (orange, pink, green, yellow, white) with close buttons and decorative squares. Clean data presentation with progress bars.

name: Focus
title: Focus - Bootstrap Admin Dashboard
description: Admin dashboard template with light purple/violet theme. Left sidebar navigation with logo, collapsible menu items including Dashboard, App (Email, Chat, Calendar), Charts, Bootstrap components, Table, Forms, Pages, and Widget sections. Top header bar with hamburger toggle, search input, notification bell with badge, message icon with badge, and user profile dropdown. Main content area with 4 stat cards showing monetary values with percentage changes and sparkline mini-charts. Income and Expenses area chart (Morris.js). Weekly Sales donut chart. Customer acquisition bar chart. To-do list widget. Recent activity timeline. Chat widget. Data tables. Purple/violet primary color with green, red, and cyan status colors.

typography.style: Clean system-like sans-serif, dashboard/admin UI feel

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar with collapsible menu, top header bar, main content area with card grid, responsive sidebar collapse at multiple breakpoints
visualStyle: Modern admin dashboard with purple/violet theme, stat cards with sparklines, multiple chart types, sidebar navigation, and data-rich widgets

name: Mono
title: Mono - Responsive Admin & Dashboard Template
description: Responsive admin and dashboard template with light theme and purple accent. Left sidebar navigation with logo, collapsible menu sections (Dashboard, App, UI Components, Forms, Charts, Table, Pages, Map, Extra). Top header bar with hamburger toggle, search input, notification dropdown with badges, message dropdown, and user profile dropdown with avatar. Main content area with 4 stat cards showing revenue figures with trend indicators. Income and Expenses line chart. Sales by category donut chart. Customer acquisition bar chart. To-do list widget with checkboxes. Recent activity feed. Chat messaging widget. Data tables with pagination. Purple primary color with green, red, pink, and cyan status indicators throughout.

typography.style: Clean modern sans-serif, dashboard/admin UI feel

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar with collapsible menu, top header bar, main content area with card grid, responsive sidebar collapse at 1500px/1200px/992px/768px/576px
visualStyle: Modern admin dashboard with purple theme, stat cards, multiple chart types, sidebar navigation, and comprehensive widget set

name: Quixlab
title: Quixlab - Bootstrap Admin Dashboard Template by Themefisher.com
description: Full-featured admin dashboard template with a dark sidebar navigation containing menu items with icons, a top header bar with search, notifications dropdown, messages dropdown, and user profile menu. The main content area displays an ecommerce-focused dashboard with multiple chart widgets (Chart.js bar and line charts, Morris.js area charts), a world map visualization (Datamaps), circular progress indicators, social media stat cards, a calendar widget, a recent activity timeline, and data tables. Fixed sidebar with collapsible menu and scrollable content area. Color-coded status indicators throughout.
layoutDetails: Fixed dark sidebar with collapsible navigation on the left. Fixed top header bar. Scrollable main content area with card-based widget grid. Multiple chart types in responsive grid.
visualStyle: Modern admin dashboard with purple primary accent, clean card-based widgets, subtle shadows, and color-coded status indicators. Light content area contrasting with dark sidebar.

typography.style: Clean dashboard typography with Roboto for data readability. Small base font for dense data display.

name: Sleek
title: Ecommerce - Sleek Admin Dashboard Template
description: Modern admin dashboard template focused on ecommerce analytics. Features a dark sidebar with navigation menu items including Dashboard, Calendar, Email, Chat, Charts, Forms, Tables, and Maps. The top header includes a search bar, notification bell with badge count, message dropdown with contact list, and user profile menu. The main content area displays revenue/order summary cards, Chart.js line and bar charts for sales analytics, a world map (jVectorMap) showing geographic distribution, date range picker, recent order tables, product listing cards, and activity feeds. Uses Material Design Icons throughout. Clean light theme with blue primary accent, color-coded status badges, and card-based widget layout. Includes RTL support and multiple theme variations.
layoutDetails: Fixed dark sidebar with icon+text navigation on the left. Fixed top header with search and dropdowns. Scrollable main content with responsive card grid. Charts and tables in flexible column layouts. Footer at bottom of content area.
visualStyle: Clean modern dashboard with blue primary accent, white card widgets with subtle shadows, dark sidebar contrast, and Material Design icons. Professional data-dense layout with color-coded status indicators and smooth transitions.

typography.style: Three-font system with Montserrat for headings, Poppins for UI elements, Roboto for data. Optimized for dashboard readability at small sizes.

name: Dashboard
title: Dashboard Admin Template by Tooplate.com
description: Admin dashboard template with a top navigation bar and multi-column content layout. Features a navbar with site title, search form, and dropdown menus. Main content area displays: a line chart for traffic/hits data, a bar chart for performance metrics, a pie chart for category distribution, and a calendar widget. Product list table with columns for name, price, and status. Notification panel with recent activity items. Sidebar with quick stats and user info. Open Sans font. Dark red (#9f1321) accent color. Gray (#e6e6e6) backgrounds with white content cards. Chart.js for data visualization.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif (Open Sans). Semi-bold headings. Smaller base size (14px) for data-dense dashboard layout.

layoutDetails: Dashboard layout with top navbar and multi-column content grid. Charts in 2-column layout. Product table full-width. Calendar widget in sidebar column. Notification panel alongside. Bootstrap 4 responsive grid.
visualStyle: Professional admin dashboard with dark red (#9f1321) accent. Gray background with white content cards. Chart.js visualizations (line, bar, pie). Data tables with status indicators. Calendar widget. Clean, functional data-focused design.

name: Modernize Tailwind
title: Modernize HTML Free Tailwind Dashboard
description: Admin dashboard template built with TailwindCSS featuring a fixed left sidebar with collapsible navigation menu organized by categories (Home, Forms, Components, Icons, Pickers, Tables, Charts, Pages). Top strip bar with AdminMart branding and pro version links. Main content area displays a dashboard with stat cards showing revenue, orders, products, and sales metrics. Sales overview bar chart using Chartist.js. Recent transactions table. Monthly earnings donut chart. Employee salary table. Product performance list with progress bars. Blog cards section. Uses Plus Jakarta Sans font and Tabler Icons.

typography.style: Clean modern sans-serif for dashboard readability

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar with categorized nav. Top utility bar. Main dashboard with stat cards, charts, tables, and blog cards.
visualStyle: Modern admin dashboard with TailwindCSS. Blue accent. Stat cards with icons. Bar and donut charts. Data tables.

name: Modish
title: Modish - Bootstrap 4 Admin Dashboard
description: Admin dashboard template with a top navbar featuring notification dropdown, user profile menu, and sidebar toggle. Left sidebar with categorized navigation (Main, Forms, Components, Icons, Pickers, Tables, Charts, Pages). Dashboard displays a sales overview bar chart using Chartist.js, stat cards for users/revenue/bounce rate/sessions, recent comments list with user avatars, and a to-do list widget. Clean flat design with Raleway and Lato fonts. Bootstrap 4 based with custom components.

typography.style: Clean Raleway headings with Lato body text

layoutDetails: Top navbar with notifications. Left dark sidebar with categorized nav. Main dashboard with charts, stat cards, comments, and todo widgets.
visualStyle: Clean flat admin dashboard with dark sidebar, purple accent. Chartist.js charts. Stat cards. Comment and todo widgets.

name: Movie Dashboard
title: Movie Dashboard - Tailwind CSS Dark Theme
description: Movie management dashboard with a left sidebar navigation featuring SVG icons for Home, Community, Discovery, Coming Soon, Profile, Friends, Media, Settings, and Logout. Dark mode toggle switch. Main content area shows a featured movie hero banner (Inception) with genre tags and Watch button. Top Stars horizontal scroll section with actor photos. Trending Movies grid with poster cards showing ratings and bookmark icons. Right sidebar displays a search bar, user profile card, and Favourite Movies list with thumbnails and ratings. Built with TailwindCSS and Alpine.js for dark mode reactivity. Montserrat font throughout.

typography.style: Clean Montserrat throughout with semibold headings

layoutDetails: Three-column layout: left nav sidebar, main content with hero banner and movie grids, right sidebar with profile and favorites.
visualStyle: Modern movie dashboard with red accent. Dark mode support. Movie poster cards with ratings. Actor photo carousel. Featured movie hero banner.
